Workload_Description: Discover, extract, and govern end-to-end lineage across semantic models, reports, and lakehouse assets.
Workload_Hub_Slogan: Automated lineage extraction and requirements-aware impact analysis in one workspace.
Workload_Hub_Description:
Lineage Workbench helps data teams understand and govern dependencies across their Fabric estate. Configure extraction once, scan one or many workspaces, and build a connected lineage model for semantic models, reports, visuals, and lakehouse structures.

Use the integrated setup wizards to provision lakehouse and environment dependencies, deploy extraction notebooks, and run scans with status tracking. Then explore relationships and document delivery requirements alongside technical lineage for faster change impact analysis and safer releases.
Workload_Hub_GetStarted_1_Title: Set Up Your First Lineage Scan
Workload_Hub_GetStarted_1_Sub_Title: Create dependencies, deploy notebooks, and extract lineage in minutes
Workload_Hub_GetStarted_1_Description: Use guided setup for lakehouse, environment, notebook deployment, and workspace selection. Run extraction jobs and start exploring cross-artifact lineage and requirements.
LineageWorkbenchItem_Description: Configure extraction, run multi-workspace lineage scans, and manage impact-driven requirements
